overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a futuristic sci-fi facility, transitioning from a bright office area with computer workstations into a darker industrial corridor with caution markings, and passing an NPC crew member.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi office laboratory with computer workstations

agents.ego_description: walking through a well-lit high-tech office past curved workstations and computer terminals

entered.detail: modern white curved workstation with computer monitors and office supplies
tall grey metal lockers lining the right wall
two framed portraits hanging on the back wall above the exit
large glass door with metal frame leading to the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bright, clean office area featuring white curved desks with computer monitors on the left and metal storage lockers on the right. Two framed portraits hang on the far wall above a glass exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with hazard markings and airlock doors

events.description: exits bright office into darker industrial corridor with metal walls and caution-striped flooring

agents.ego_description: proceeding through a narrow industrial corridor toward a metal airlock door, passing a stationary crew member

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the doorway wearing a yellow and grey uniform

entered.detail: dark metal walls with diamond plate texture and industrial lighting
floor marked with yellow and black hazard stripes near the doorway
heavy industrial metal door with small window at the corridor end
control panel with illuminated buttons mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a darker, narrower industrial corridor with metal walls and caution-striped flooring. The character walks toward a heavy metal airlock door at the end, passing an NPC in a yellow uniform standing near a wall control panel on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, sterile office environment into a dim, industrial corridor. It begins by following the character through a clean workspace filled with white curved desks, computer monitors, and metal storage lockers. As the character moves toward a glass exit door beneath two framed portraits, the scene shifts abruptly into a narrower passage with metal walls and caution-striped flooring. The camera then tracks forward through this darker space, passing a crew member in a yellow uniform stationed at a wall control panel. The movement finally concludes as the character approaches a heavy metal airlock door at the end of the corridor.
